---
name: Roadmap task
about: Track a scoped public roadmap item with evidence and claim boundaries
title: "[Roadmap]: "
labels: roadmap
assignees: ""
---

## Task

Describe the public, reusable improvement.

## Roadmap track

- [ ] Core harness
- [ ] Demo validation
- [ ] Skill generation
- [ ] Knowledge base
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release hygiene

## Current evidence level

- [ ] Planned
- [ ] Implementation-ready
- [ ] Partial
- [ ] Golden
- [ ] Blocked

## Acceptance checks

- [ ] The change has a clear user-facing outcome.
- [ ] Any dataset/API claim is backed by an official source or knowledge-base card.
- [ ] Tests, docs, or validation outputs are updated as appropriate.
- [ ] Status labels match `docs/roadmap.md` and `docs/capability_matrix.md`.
- [ ] No credentials, private asset ids, unpublished research outputs, or local private paths are committed.

## Claim boundary

What can this task support after completion?

What must it not claim?
